title: Clear Glass Vanilla
description: This texturepack deletes the edges from the glass.
body:
With this mod your glass looks better when it is connected. It removes the edges from the glass. It works with normal glass blocks and also with glass panes. The mod is tested to all 1.21.x versions but it will also work at other ones.

If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
